shared_attributes.design_principle: simple shapes, clear motion, temporary display

context.role: dust particle during dirty state, visualizes cage uncleanliness
context.screen_position: spawns around Echo (x=64±15, y=60±10), floats randomly
context.usage_scenario: spawns continuously during dirty state (3+ poop present), 3-5 dust particles visible at a time, creates uncomfortable atmosphere

animation.description: spawns around Echo, drifts slowly in random direction 4-6px over 2 seconds, fades out, new dust spawns every 0.5 seconds during dirty state, 3-5 particles visible simultaneously

visual_specification.details: gray dust pixel (#C2C3C7), 1x1px, spawns every 0.5 seconds during dirty state, drifts slowly in random directions, disappears after 2 seconds, 3-5 particles visible at once, subtle discomfort indicator

relationships.differences_from: smallest particle (1x1px), random motion (not directional), continuous spawning during dirty state, environmental effect (not action-triggered)

explicit_negations: no larger dust clouds (single pixels only)
no more than 5 particles at once
